method.name: Deserialize
method.summary: Deserialize an Object from a Byte Array.

method.name: FromFile
method.summary: Read an instance from the given file using DataContractSerializer.
method.param: Path to the file to read.
Context controlling logging and exception behavior.
method.returns: Instance of TResult if the file exists and deserialization succeeds; otherwise default.

method.name: ParseBase64
method.summary: Deserialize an instance from a Base64-encoded binary XML string.
method.param: Context controlling logging and exception behavior.
method.returns: Instance of TResult if parsing succeeds; otherwise null.

method.name: ParseBase64Type
method.summary: Deserialize an instance from a Base64-encoded binary XML string using a runtime Type value.
method.param: Context controlling logging and exception behavior.
method.returns: Instance of the requested runtime type if parsing succeeds; otherwise null.

method.name: Serialize
method.summary: Serialize an instance to a binary buffer using the same DataContractSerializer configuration used by ToBase64String.
method.param: Context controlling logging and exception behavior.
method.returns: Binary buffer representing the serialized instance.

method.name: ToBase64String
method.summary: Serialize an instance to a Base64-encoded binary XML string using DataContractSerializer.
method.param: Context controlling logging and exception behavior.
method.returns: Base64-encoded binary XML representation of the instance.
method.remarks: The concrete runtime type of instance is used when constructing the underlying DataContractSerializer.

method.name: ToFile
method.summary: Write the specified instance to the given file using DataContractSerializer.
method.param: Context controlling logging and exception behavior.
method.returns: True if the file was created and written successfully; false if the file already exists or an error occurred.

method.name: TryParseBase64
method.summary: Attempt to deserialize an instance from a Base64-encoded binary XML string.
method.param: Context controlling logging and exception behavior.
Deserialized instance if the operation succeeds; otherwise null.
method.returns: True if parsing succeeded; otherwise false.

method.name: TryParseBase64Type
method.summary: Attempt to deserialize an instance from a Base64-encoded binary XML string using a runtime Type value.
method.param: Context controlling logging and exception behavior.
Deserialized instance if the operation succeeds; otherwise null.
method.returns: True if parsing succeeded; otherwise false.
